name: Chocolate Surprise Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Butter and flour a 13 by 2-1/2 inch long baking pan. In the top of a double boiler, whisk eggs and sugar together over simmering water until they are hot. Remove from heat. Beat with an electric mixer until thick. Gently fold in cake flour and melted butter. Mix just until smooth (do not overmix). Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes. Cool in the pan on a rack for a few minutes. Turn the cake out of the pan onto a cooling rack. When completely cool, put the cake back into the pan. Scoop out a cavity about 1 inch deep and 2 inches wide.
In a heavy saucepan, bring cocoa, powdered sugar, butter, and cream to a boil. Stir constantly. Lower heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Cool until the bottom of the saucepan is not too hot to touch (let cool to this point or the fudge sauce will soak into the cake too much). Pour the cooled fudge mixture into the cavity. Refrigerate until set, about 2 hours. Invert the cake onto a serving platter. Serve garnished with powdered sugar.
